alt.zh-TW: CharaForge T2I Lab 的完整作品集導覽錄影。
alt.en: Complete portfolio walkthrough recording for CharaForge T2I Lab.

title.zh-TW: 完整 Demo 導覽錄影

caption.zh-TW: 展示 dashboard、文生圖結果、ControlNet、批次佇列、LoRA 訓練監控與 API/job 狀態。
caption.en: Shows the dashboard, T2I result, ControlNet flow, batch queue, LoRA training monitor, and API/job state.

alt.zh-TW: CharaForge T2I Lab dashboard 總覽截圖。
alt.en: CharaForge T2I Lab dashboard overview screenshot.

caption.zh-TW: GitHub Pages 靜態展示入口，讓面試官不用 GPU 也能理解產品定位與主要流程。
caption.en: Static GitHub Pages entry point that explains the product positioning and main flows without requiring a GPU.

alt.zh-TW: 文生圖角色生成結果與 metadata 截圖。
alt.en: Text-to-image character result and metadata screenshot.

caption.zh-TW: 展示 prompt、seed、LoRA stack、輸出 metadata 與可複現的生成狀態。
caption.en: Shows prompt, seed, LoRA stack, output metadata, and reproducible generation state.

alt.zh-TW: ControlNet 條件控制生成流程截圖。

caption.zh-TW: 呈現 pose/depth/canny/lineart 類條件輸入如何接進非同步生成流程。
caption.en: Shows how pose/depth/canny/lineart conditioning fits into the async generation flow.

alt.zh-TW: 批次文生圖佇列與輸出流程截圖。
alt.en: Batch text-to-image queue and output flow screenshot.

caption.zh-TW: 展示多 prompt 批次、佇列狀態、下載輸出與成本治理的介面。
caption.en: Shows multi-prompt batches, queue state, downloadable outputs, and cost governance.

alt.zh-TW: LoRA 訓練監控、loss 與 checkpoint 匯出截圖。
alt.en: LoRA training monitor, loss, and checkpoint export screenshot.

caption.zh-TW: 展示 dataset validation、訓練進度、loss trend、checkpoint export 與 WebSocket 更新。
caption.en: Shows dataset validation, training progress, loss trend, checkpoint export, and WebSocket updates.

alt.zh-TW: API contract 與非同步 job state 截圖。
alt.en: API contract and async job state screenshot.

caption.zh-TW: 用 reviewer-friendly 的方式呈現 submit/status/cancel 合約與狀態模型。
caption.en: Presents the submit/status/cancel contract and state model in a reviewer-friendly format.

alt.zh-TW: 生成圖庫與結果審閱狀態截圖。
alt.en: Generated gallery and result review state screenshot.

caption.zh-TW: 展示生成結果如何被保存、整理與用於後續篩選比較。
caption.en: Shows how generated results are saved, organized, and prepared for later review.

metadata.projectType: Text-to-image + LoRA fine-tuning platform / portfolio demo
capabilities: 批次 prompt 佇列與輸出管理
非同步任務佇列與並發治理
Dataset validation 與訓練前檢查
WebSocket 即時訓練進度推送
API Key / JWT 認證與速率限制
Prometheus 指標與結構化日誌
GitHub Pages 靜態 demo 展示
